# cmd-params

Golden conversion cases under this subsystem.

| Case | Direction | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [applicationset-flags](applicationset-flags.md) | `from` | ApplicationSet progressive syncs, policy override, reconciliations limit, requeue |
| [applicationset-full](applicationset-full.md) | `roundtrip` | ApplicationSet controller flags including k8s client, repo server certs, scm root ca |
| [commit-dex-notifications](commit-dex-notifications.md) | `roundtrip` | Commit-server, dex-server, and notifications-controller cmd-params |
| [controller-full](controller-full.md) | `roundtrip` | Controller cmd-params: sharding, logs, processors, caches, metrics, self.heal, sync, extras from HA/metrics docs |
| [k8s-client-and-quantity](k8s-client-and-quantity.md) | `roundtrip` | controller k8s client QPS/burst/TCP/retry and reposerver quantity size limits |
| [logging-and-commit](logging-and-commit.md) | `roundtrip` | log.format.timestamp, commit.server, and commit.author.* settings |
| [reposerver-full](reposerver-full.md) | `roundtrip` | Repo-server cmd-params: bools, timeouts, size quantities, OCI, TLS, client CA, tar exclusions |
| [server-cache-tls](server-cache-tls.md) | `roundtrip` | server cmd-params: basehref, cache expirations, TLS min/max/ciphers, dex connection |
| [server-full](server-full.md) | `roundtrip` | Server cmd-params: listen/basehref/auth/gzip/proxy/TLS/dex/webhook/k8sClient from cmd-params sample |
